_note: Sharia-compliant fund universe for the solar-system sleeves (Zero masterclass). Curated reference, NOT a live screen — confirm each against Zoya/Musaffa before buying. Fields: `symbol` = human display ticker; `t212` = the EXACT Trading 212 API ticker (the real buy identifier, e.g. ISWDl_EQ — `l`=London, `a`=Amsterdam; null = not on T212); `yahoo` = price-feed symbol; `currency` = the line's T212 quote currency (GBX = pence sterling, treated like GBP — no FX fee; USD incurs the 0.15% T212 FX fee). Sterling lines (GBP/GBX) are preferred where they exist. Verified live against the T212 instruments catalogue on 2026-06-27 — every entry below (except spot crypto) is buyable on T212.

core.name: iShares MSCI World Islamic UCITS ETF (London, GBX line)
core.note: the World-Islamic core — sterling-quoted (pence), no FX fee. Preferred over ISDW (USD).

core.name: HSBC MSCI World Islamic Screened UCITS ETF
core.note: alt world-Islamic core — GBP-quoted, no FX fee.

core.name: iShares MSCI World Islamic UCITS ETF (USD line)
core.note: same fund as ISWD but USD-quoted — incurs the 0.15% FX fee. Use ISWD instead.

core.name: iShares MSCI USA Islamic UCITS ETF (London, GBX line)
core.note: halal S&P 500 stand-in; sterling-quoted (pence) LSE line (no FX fee).

core.name: Wahed S&P 500 Shariah UCITS ETF (Acc)
core.note: halal S&P 500 (USD line, FX applies). T212-available replacement for the US-listed SPUS, which T212 does not offer.

income.name: Wahed Dow Jones Islamic World UCITS ETF (Acc)
income.note: quality tilt (USD). Same Wahed DJ Islamic World fund as the US-listed HLAL, under its T212/UCITS ticker.

income.name: Xtrackers II Salam USD Global Aggregate Sukuk UCITS ETF (Dist)
income.sharia_source: Bloomberg Global USD Sukuk Index (ASB Capital Shariah Board)

income.name: HSBC Global Sukuk UCITS ETF (London, GBP line)
income.note: GBP-quoted sukuk — no FX fee. T212-available replacement for the US-listed SPSK. (USD line: HBKUl_EQ / HBKU.L.)

income.name: iShares $ Sukuk UCITS ETF (Amsterdam, Dist)
income.note: large, liquid USD sukuk ETF (Amsterdam line on T212 — the `a` suffix; FX applies).

income.name: HANetf Saturna Al-Kawthar Global Focused Equity UCITS ETF

satellite_etf.name: iShares Physical Gold ETC (London, GBX line)
satellite_etf.note: physically backed, sterling-quoted (pence, no FX), unhedged. Sharia-compliant.

satellite_etf.name: iShares Physical Gold GBP Hedged ETC
satellite_etf.note: physically backed, GBP-quoted + GBP-hedged (removes USD FX swings).

satellite_etf.name: HSBC MSCI EM Islamic Screened UCITS ETF
satellite_etf.note: Sharia EM, GBP-quoted LSE line (no FX).

satellite_etf.name: iShares MSCI EM Islamic UCITS ETF (Dist)
satellite_etf.note: USD-quoted on T212 (FX applies) — there is no GBP line.

crypto.name: Bitcoin (spot)
crypto.note: spot only — NOT on T212 UK ISA; buy via a spot exchange.

crypto.name: Ethereum (spot)
crypto.note: spot only — NOT on T212; staking has its own screening question.

cash_defensive.name: HSBC Global Sukuk UCITS ETF (London, GBP line)
cash_defensive.note: yield on the defensive base — GBP-quoted sukuk (no FX). Replaces the US-listed SPSK.
